meta.purpose: Screenshot-only artifact — SigNoz seasonal anomaly alerts use ≥5m eval windows and cannot fire live on camera. Pair visually with Griffin card (docs/04, docs/07).
meta.notes: Flat condition + preferredChannels required on SigNoz v0.133; nested thresholds rejected.

description: Native SigNoz seasonal z-score on arcnet.tokens.total. Needs days of history. Screenshot next to Griffin (zero-shot MAD/TabFM) for the pairing story.
summary: SigNoz seasonal anomaly on token rate
readme_screenshot_slot: Place this rule UI next to the Griffin card on Fleet Health — seasonal learns weeks; Griffin covers the first 15 minutes.
